revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-375

Structural timber board manufactured from an odd number of sheets of veneer glued together, the grain of each sheet alternating at right angles in each layer, giving a high strength and dimensional stability.

{{IALAFooter}}
